summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of V85 Travanalys app improvements. All requested features successfully implemented and working correctly.
passed_tests: Market % column calculation (1/odds)*100 with 1 decimal - verified correct
Value Ratio display with status text (Underspelad/Neutral/Överspelad) - working
Play column with three levels (Stark play/Möjlig play/No play) - implemented
Default sorting by value_ratio - confirmed active
Ranking Score column (renamed from value_score) - present and functional
Race classification above table (Värdelopp/Favoritlopp/Rörigt lopp) - working
Race classification logic correctly identifies 3 horses with good value
CSV export functionality - button present and enabled
SystemBuilder uses ranking_score instead of value_score - confirmed
Table sorting functionality - working on all columns
Filter dropdown with options (Alla hästar/Spelvärda/Favoriter) - working
Search functionality by horse name or number - working
All data-testid attributes present for testing
